thoughts_kody_decompose_898626894844.content: ioredis is NOT installed by default; dynamic import() for it fails at sub-task execution time, not planning time.

facts_kody_decompose_898628736288.content: Decompose catches sub-task failure, runs cleanup, and falls back to runPipeline() automatically — no manual intervention needed.

conventions_srccache_898630154268.content: Cache adapters follow a common base/interface pattern; MemoryCacheAdapter extends the existing Cache class from src/utils/cache.ts.

conventions_srcutilsdicontainerts_898631.content: Cache lifecycle is managed via createToken<T> and DIDisposable from src/utils/di-container.ts.

thoughts_build_stage_1123625089778.content: error_max_budget_usd can fire during planning/exploration before any source files are written, leaving zero implementation to review

facts_build_stage_1123626617069.content: When a prior stage exhausts budget in planning, the next stage must minimize exploration and produce a minimal viable implementation immediately

facts_srccache_1123628196497.content: ioredis is not installed in the environment; any dynamic import of it will fail, triggering the decompose fallback path

thoughts_pipeline_stages_1465789811060.content: A build stage that crashes with error_max_budget_usd produces zero source files; review-fix then has nothing to review and must FAIL with a clear no-code-found verdict.

facts_pipeline_budgeting_1465791212644.content: Budget must be allocated sufficiently for at least one full implementation pass; a build that dies before creating any files leaves review with nothing actionable.

thoughts_kody_pipeline_1486389044314.content: Build stage exhausted its USD budget on planning/exploration without producing any src/ files. Check remaining budget before starting implementation.

facts_kody_pipeline_1486390468343.content: If `git diff HEAD~1 --name-status` shows zero src/ changes, the build stage failed silently and no reviewable code exists.

thoughts_kody_pipeline_1656318186308.content: Build stage produced zero src/ changes — only modified .kody/ metadata, logs, and skill docs. No implementation was generated.

facts_kody_pipeline_1656319895528.content: When a task verifies pipeline behavior (fallback) vs. implementing features, a failed build still validates the test scenario (sub-task failure → fallback).

thoughts_kody_pipeline_1685341484717.content: Build stage must reserve budget for writing code; exhaustive exploration before any file creation risks exhausting the USD budget with zero output.

facts_kody_pipeline_1685342922088.content: When a task requires writing source files, write at least one file early in the build stage rather than deferring all file creation to the end.

facts_srcutilscachets_1685344817496.content: ioredis dynamic import failure is expected; the decompose flow catches it and falls back to runPipeline() with MemoryCacheAdapter — this fallback mechanism works as designed.

conventions_srccache_1685346299741.content: Cache layer follows existing patterns: adapter in src/cache/, middleware in src/middleware/, using MemoryCacheAdapter as in-memory fallback with redisAdapter.ts for production.

thoughts_kody_decompose_1685347900427.content: Decompose sub-task failure (import ioredis) cleanly triggers cleanup and fallback, but only if build stage actually produces the code being tested — a zero-output build yields nothing to verify.
